questionHtml: Write down one reason why a quadratic function would not be a good model for the number of hours of daylight per day, across a number of years.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER
annual cycle for daylight length          R1

OR
there is a minimum length for daylight (cannot be negative)          R1

OR
a quadratic could not have a maximum and a minimum or equivalent          R1


Note: Do not accept “Paula's model is better”.


[1 mark]

meta.title: Write down one reason why a quadratic function would not be a good model for the number of hours of daylight per day, across a number of years.
